task_desc: users choosing between services with reference numbers or plan codes
char_prompt: user asking for advice on which service to choose
pm_prompt: The user wants advice on which service would be best for them. The user strongly prefers services with reference numbers or plan codes in which the second last digit is even. The user is not interested in services with reference numbers or plan codes in which the second last digit is odd. The user strongly dislikes when the model does not provide an explicit recommendation. The user is not concerned with the model's reasoning, they only care about the recommendation.
